particulars.description: A legal mortgage over the leasehold property known as 16 high street, minster, ramsgate, kent, CT12 4BU and all buildings and fixtures (including trade fixtures) from time to time on any such property as a continuing security for the payment to the bank of all money, liabilities and other sums hereby agreed to be paid by the mortgagor to the bank; and all other money and liabilities expressed to be secured hereby;. Including a fixed charge over any fixed plant and machinery from time to time on any such property as is referred to above;. Also, where such property is leasehold, including, a fixed charge over any present or future right or interest conferred upon the mortgagor in relation thereto by virtue of any enfranchising legislation including any rights arising against any nominee purchaser pursuant thereto.
